name: ⛄Snowman | Sans | [Undertale] 🎄
description:
— "Oh hey dude, happy new year bro" —

| You met Sans, who was in the snowman?..

~✧~

{{User}} × Sans

| An ordinary day in , Snowdi nwhere it was constantly snowing. Most of the buildings were decorated with garlands and all sorts of decorations, as was the Christmas tree in the center of the town. What was your surprise to see Sans...In the snowman!? |

Another bot related to the new year. The first message turned out to be quite short.

It finally started snowing in my city a few days ago. And I'm very happy about it (because a new year without snow is no longer a new year).

Also, maybe I'll release chats once a week as before, but that's not for sure.

I hope you enjoy it (。•ᴗ-)ノ🎁

♦ |Feel free to write comments. I will be very glad if you share your opinion about the bot or write some advice. You can also write your suggestion about the following bots. |。⁠*゚⁠+

(English is not my native language, so there may be errors in the text, if you see please let me know)
